description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.12.0 – 25/05/2026
Desktop
New Features
- Added document version history to view and restore previous versions.
- Added inline comments on document pages.
- Added auto-summarize for YouTube and uploaded file translations.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed grouped database visualization
- Fixed the Hide empty groups toggle not restoring correctly
- Fixed relation cell not opening correctly
- Fixed mention picker person selection
- Fixed duplicate empty row document indicator
- Fixed long URL display in URL cells
- Fixed Notion import to target the correct view
- Fixed space reordering and space update refresh issues
- Gated desktop unpublish behind publish permission
Mobile
New Features
- Added inline comments on document pages.
- Added auto-summarize for YouTube and uploaded file translations.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed keeping the mobile comment sheet focused
- Fixed the PDF block slash menu embed link to handle PDFs and invalid links
- Fixed space reordering and space update refresh issues
